tagline: Changing our clients' lives by changing the way they live outdoors.

hero.headline: 48 Years of Transforming Outdoor Living
hero.subheadline: Three generations of the Farrell family have turned 3,000+ backyards into personal retreats. From custom landscapes to full outdoor living spaces, we bring your vision to life across Ohio and Indiana.

services.headline: Everything Your Property Needs
services.subtitle: From design to maintenance, garden center to snow removal — one trusted family handles it all.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Custom designs brought to life with premium plantings, trees, and complete outdoor transformations tailored to your vision.

cards.title: Paver Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: Unilock-authorized paver patios, walkways, and retaining walls installed with precision craftsmanship that lasts decades.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living Spaces
cards.description: Extend your home into the backyard with custom-built outdoor kitchens, fire features, and gathering spaces.

cards.title: Pool Installation
cards.description: Create the perfect backyard oasis with professional pool installation designed around your family's lifestyle.

cards.title: Lawn Care & Fertilization
cards.description: Keep your lawn healthy and green year-round with expert mowing, fertilization, weed control, and overseeding.

cards.title: Snow Removal & Plowing
cards.description: Reliable winter services that keep your driveways and walkways safe and accessible all season long.

how_it_works.headline: Your Project in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.description: We visit your property, listen to your ideas, and discuss what's possible within your budget and timeline.

steps.title: Custom Design & Plan
steps.description: Our team creates a detailed design with material selections, timeline, and transparent pricing — no surprises.

steps.title: Expert Installation
steps.description: Our certified crew brings your vision to life with meticulous attention to detail, leaving your property spotless.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1976
about.headline: Two Generations of Landscape Excellence
about.description: Founded by Tony and Wendy Farrell nearly five decades ago, our company is now led by Clayton Farrell and his sister Katelynn. We've grown from a small garden center into a full-service landscape company — but we've never lost the personal touch that comes with being family-owned. Every project gets the same care we'd give our own home.
about.badge: ICPI Certified • Unilock Authorized • BBB A+

features.title: Second-Generation Family Ownership
features.description: Clayton and Katelynn Farrell carry on their parents' legacy with the same dedication to quality that built this company 48 years ago.

features.title: Retail Garden Center On-Site
features.description: Visit our garden center for plants, flowers, soil, gravel, unique gifts, and expert horticultural advice from our knowledgeable staff.

features.title: Serving Ohio & Indiana
features.description: We proudly serve Williams County and surrounding communities across state lines, bringing exceptional landscaping wherever it's needed.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every project starts with a free consultation and detailed quote. You'll know exactly what to expect before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: Our Family's Promise to Yours
guarantee.description: With 48 years of reputation on the line, we stand behind every project we complete. If something isn't right, we'll make it right — that's the Farrell family guarantee. Our ICPI certification and Unilock authorization mean your hardscape work meets the highest industry standards.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Williams County, Ohio and surrounding areas in both Ohio and Indiana. If you're unsure whether we cover your location, give us a call and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book a landscape project?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking 4-6 weeks ahead during peak season (spring and summer). For larger projects like patios or outdoor kitchens, scheduling 2-3 months in advance ensures you get your preferred timeline.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing or payment plans?
faqs.answer: We offer flexible payment options for larger projects. During your free consultation, we'll discuss budget-friendly approaches and payment structures that work for your situation.

faqs.question: What makes you different from other landscapers?
faqs.answer: We're ICPI certified and a Unilock Authorized Contractor — credentials that fewer than 5% of landscapers hold. Combined with 48 years of experience, 3,000+ completed projects, and our own retail garden center, we offer expertise and resources most companies simply can't match.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide full commercial maintenance including lawn care, landscape upkeep, parking lot maintenance, and snow removal — plus all the design and installation services we offer residential clients.

testimonials.name: Cynthia Caja
testimonials.text: Clayton and Kevin were great. They went above and beyond. We are very pleased with the unique design and ultimate appearance. They checked in with us often and remained attentive to our needs.

testimonials.name: Shari Saneda
testimonials.text: Farrells have serviced my lawn and snow removal for over 8 years. Professional, prompt and affordable.

testimonials.name: Conner Lemons
testimonials.text: FLG is by far a state of the art company when it comes to your new outdoor living space.
